title: Fix release package docs copy list and guard it
action: Resolve the open review P1: release.yml package step must not copy deleted docs/usage.md or docs/deployment.md. Copy only current docs and add a focused rename_contract.sh guard that fails when release.yml references a docs/*.md package input that does not exist.

truths: The release package step no longer references docs/usage.md or docs/deployment.md.
Every docs/*.md path copied by release.yml's package step exists in the current tree.
The existing release archive name and herdr-go identity checks remain intact.

artifacts.substantive: package docs copy list references only existing docs
focused guard checks release docs copy paths exist

key_links: tests/rename_contract.sh protects the exact release.yml docs copy command from stale deleted paths
prohibitions: Do not restore docs/usage.md or docs/deployment.md for this fix.
Do not change release target matrix or installer behavior in this P1 fix.

verify: bash tests/rename_contract.sh && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Removed deleted documentation from the release package and added a guard for stale package documentation paths.
trace.verification_evidence: {"tests_inspected":["tests/rename_contract.sh"],"tests_added_or_changed":["tests/rename_contract.sh (release package documentation existence guard)"],"red_failure_evidence":"Before this change, release.yml copied docs/usage.md and docs/deployment.md; both paths are absent from the current tree, so the Package step would fail.","verification_run":"bash tests/rename_contract.sh && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run: passed (102 Rust tests; 20 web tests).","deliberate_exceptions":[]}
trace.verify_output: rename contract: ok; Rust tests passed: 97 + 2 + 3; clippy clean; web bundle passed; Vitest passed: 4 files, 20 tests. jsdom emitted known HTMLCanvasElement.getContext stderr from terminal test.
trace.verify_command: bash tests/rename_contract.sh && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
